meaning: vi.腐朽,腐烂,衰减,衰退n.腐朽,腐烂,衰减,衰退v.衰落
examples: There are problems of urban decay and gang violence.
When not removed, plaque causes tooth decay and gum disease.
The landlord had let the building fall into decay.
Despite its graceful, moss-swathed decay, the gate is undeniably imposing, its four giant bodhisattva faces staring beatifically out.
That process of decay would result in the particles losing substantial amounts of energy.
